Uses of Package
org.moeaframework.analysis.collector

Packages that use org.moeaframework.analysis.collector
Package
Description
org.moeaframework
Convenience classes for using the MOEA Framework.
org.moeaframework.analysis.collector
Collectors record information periodically during the execution of an algorithm.
org.moeaframework.analysis.diagnostics
Diagnostic tool for analyzing the runtime behavior of algorithms.
org.moeaframework.analysis.plot
Basic 2D plotting support.
  • Classes in org.moeaframework.analysis.collector used by org.moeaframework
    Class
    Description
    Collector
    Collects information from an object.
    InstrumentedAlgorithm
    Wraps an algorithm to indicate it is instrumented to collect runtime data.
    InstrumentedExtension
    Decorates an algorithm to periodically collect information about its runtime behavior.
    Observations
    The observations collected over the course of a single algorithm run.
  • Classes in org.moeaframework.analysis.collector used by org.moeaframework.analysis.collector
    Class
    Description
    AttachPoint
    Identifies objects in an object graph (all public and private fields contained within an object and those it references).
    Collector
    Collects information from an object.
    InstrumentedExtension
    Decorates an algorithm to periodically collect information about its runtime behavior.
    Observation
    An observation records information about an algorithm at a point in time.
    Observations
    The observations collected over the course of a single algorithm run.
  • Classes in org.moeaframework.analysis.collector used by org.moeaframework.analysis.diagnostics
    Class
    Description
    Observations
    The observations collected over the course of a single algorithm run.
